title: papaver dubium subsp. austromoravicum
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. austromoravicum, commonly known as the pale poppy or lesser meadow poppy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). This plant is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Papaver dubium subsp. austromoravicum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its flowers and leaves in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
